name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, improvement, documentation update, or SEO enhancement
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Summary

Describe the requested feature or improvement.

## Use Case

Explain who needs this and why it would be useful.

## Suggested Solution

Describe the implementation or behavior you would like to see.

## Alternatives

Describe alternatives you considered or current workarounds.

## Additional Context

Add links, examples, screenshots, references, or related issues.
